{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323021402B0C7729FBBDA49AD6218"}"},"total":5781},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7541796984396350270","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"可以可以。推荐，就是女主太多了，但是身世背景都描绘的很完美，一下子让我说全部的女主我说不过来，但是你要只说一个女主的名字，我立马就能把这个女主的身世背景讲出来"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1755965261,"group_id":"7454952478845455384","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"听书四五载，回眸一望，本本都精彩","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3cMpurvTO6Mp786uDnTdKk=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6732b1210849438999ce18a85174094f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788664&x-signature=YYABioJK1mAj8rKfLjtQrAcnSBM%3D","user_id":"86884883336","user_name":"玄狐听书"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"86884883336","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7454952478845455384","book_info":{"abstract":"功成名就的宋鹤卿来到了一个未知的世界，面前此时正摆着一封离婚协议书。
当时他毫不犹豫的写下了自己的名字，直到那句“爹爹”响起，让他瞬间傻眼了。
居然就这么“喜当爹”了？
他原本不想搭理，可那四岁的小姑娘实在是太可爱了。
只是有了闺女也就算了，莫名其妙的“辅助系统”更加狗血。
里面居然有橙色大奖“位列仙班”，这谁遭得住？
虽然他觉得抽中这玩意的几率，不亚于中六个红球加一个蓝球，而且还是顺序都不能变的那种。
可他到底还是经不起诱惑。
只是……第一个任务就是送外卖，让宋鹤卿怀疑这玩意是不是把他骗进来杀的。
新书发布，还请各位多多支持。
大家都知道的，但凡神明保佑我身体健康，我是不会断更的。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/19aa3a90b68fcf394cbf40a54688a0fe","author":"非布司她","author_id":"","book_id":"7454952478845455384","book_name":"不要飞升，不要飞升","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":42,"name":"奶爸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=42&name=奶爸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":75,"name":"外卖","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=75&name=外卖&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7455168095632491032","read_count":"41843","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1958205"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.7","serial_count":"923","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,奶爸,外卖","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/eb89afcc015944e6809abe98fffec9e6~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779387242&x-signature=9YQJmQ%2BNxXlddrGoKKfpK2BERbk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"111137318430","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"194"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323021402B0C7729FBBDA49AD6218"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读12小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":22,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duratio
